meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas (Advanced Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no project ideas. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no project ideas
content.seo_description: Learn how to build SaaS pricing logic to overcome project paralysis. An advanced case study using Antigravity and Claude Code for your portfolio.
content.answer_block: Overcome project paralysis by building a dynamic SaaS pricing engine. Instead of searching for ideas, build the infrastructure that powers them. By integrating tiered subscription logic using Antigravity and Claude Code, you gain a high-value, reusable component that turns any basic app into a professional, revenue-ready SaaS prototype.
content.intro:
You stare at a blank IDE, the cursor blinking with rhythmic indifference. You have the technical skills, but the 'no project ideas' wall is a mental fortress built from fear of irrelevance. You don't need another To-Do list; you need a system that mimics the complexity of production-grade software.

Enter the SaaS pricing engine. It is the heartbeat of every successful platform and the perfect challenge to transform a student project into an enterprise-ready portfolio piece. By architecting a robust billing system, you move beyond simple CRUD apps and into the realm of real-world software engineering.

steps.title: Define the Tiered Architecture
steps.description: Establish the data structure for Free, Pro, and Enterprise tiers. We focus on clear separation of concerns.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a TypeScript interface for a SaaS pricing model supporting three tiers, including feature flags, pricing in cents, and billing intervals (monthly/yearly).
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create pricing-schema.ts using the generated interface'

steps.title: Implement Pricing Logic
steps.description: Create the business logic that calculates costs based on user selection and coupon application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a robust function to calculate subscription costs including prorated discounts and tax multipliers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement calculatePrice function in pricing-engine.ts'

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Webhook Handlers
steps.description: Handle real-world payment state changes securely within your application flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a secure Express.js webhook handler to listen for customer.subscription.updated events.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add webhook-handler.ts with signature verification'

steps.title: Build the Pricing UI Component
steps.description: Develop a responsive, high-conversion pricing table that dynamically updates based on the engine.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a React component using Tailwind CSS that renders the pricing tiers with toggleable monthly/yearly views.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'scaffold PricingTable.tsx with responsive grid'

steps.title: Automated Testing for Billing
steps.description: Ensure your pricing engine never fails with edge-case unit tests.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Jest test cases for the pricing-engine covering invalid coupon codes and negative inputs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create pricing-engine.test.ts and run tests'

pro_tips: Always store currency as integers (cents) to avoid floating-point arithmetic errors in billing.
Implement 'soft-gating' in your UI: hide premium features behind a UI layer rather than just client-side conditional rendering.
Use a 'grace period' logic in your database schema to handle payment failures without immediate user churn.
Design your schema to be 'feature-flag first' so you can add new tiers without rewriting the database layer.
Always log billing events to a separate audit table for easier reconciliation during tax season.
content.next_steps: Deploy your pricing engine to a staging environment, integrate a mock Stripe dashboard, and share your repository on LinkedIn to showcase your ability to handle complex billing logic.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start building the perfect infrastructure. Your portfolio deserves a project that solves real business problems. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
